narrative:
Aubrey Modiba is a Left-Back representing South Africa at the FIFA World Cup 2026. His overall rating of 7.13/10 places him in the top 6% of left-backs at this tournament. This rating reflects 71% from club form and 29% from his World Cup performances.

Modiba demonstrates strong defensive capabilities, averaging 2.853 tackles and 1.816 clearances per 90 minutes at this World Cup. His offensive output is more modest, with an expected goals per 90 minutes of 0.04 and expected assists of 0.063. This World Cup xA is notably lower than his club level xA of 0.146 over the last two seasons.

Modiba primarily serves as a defensively solid Left-Back for his national team, contributing significantly in winning possession and clearing danger. Scouts should continue to monitor his consistent defensive contributions, particularly his tackles and interceptions. Fans should also watch for any increased involvement in the final third as the tournament progresses.
